extension.summary: Browse, stream, and build STRM libraries from rclone remotes
Browse, stream, and build STRM libraries from rclone remotes
extension.description: Browse crypt, combine, and other rclone remotes; stream through a local rclone server; and export folders as STRM files for the Kodi library. Includes incremental sync, new-content tracking, favorites, search, and bounded temporary storage.

Browse crypt, combine, and other rclone remotes; stream through a local rclone server; and export folders as STRM files for the Kodi library. Includes incremental sync, new-content tracking, favorites, search, and bounded temporary storage.
extension.news: 1.3.1: Complete English (US) interface, documentation, diagnostics, and artwork translation. Added GitHub-ready build and validation files.
